title: My Socks
description: At the bus stop after school, Kid-1 catches Kid-2 wearing her socks, but Kid-2 defends himself with the kind of logic only a little brother could think makes sense.
alt: Grandma Kelly, Pa, Kid-1, and Kid-3 wait at the end of the driveway as Kid-2 gets off the school bus wearing Kid-1's bright, obvious socks. Kid-1 points at his feet and asks, 'Are you wearing my socks?' Kid-2 smugly replies, 'You wear them all the time.' Kid-1 answers, 'Yeah, because they are MY socks!' while Grandma Kelly tries not to laugh, Pa watches deadpan with his Pa mug, and Kid-3 points excitedly while holding her stuffed bunny.
